goal: 发布 Claude Code experimental public support

summary.title: 发布 Claude Code experimental public support
summary.what: 将 claude-code 从 private adapter 提升为 public CLI source，开放固定命令面的 --source claude-code，补齐 focused tests、当前态文档、发行 skill 文案，并把版本 bump 到 0.3.6。
summary.why: 用户目标是把 Claude Code support 继续推进到可发布状态。当前实现已经有可工作的 adapter，缺口主要在 public CLI gate、用户面文档/skill 对齐，以及版本与发布闭环。
summary.user_goal: 发布 Claude Code experimental public support

decisions.point: Claude Code public contract should be stable or experimental
decisions.chose: Shipped claude-code as experimental public support on the fixed command surface while keeping Codex as the default omitted-source behavior.
decisions.rationale: The repo already had a functioning transcript reader and source-aware storage/query path, but current evidence still does not justify a stable raw-format promise.
rejected: Keep claude-code private/non-public and defer all public exposure again.
Claim stable public support immediately without preserving the experimental contract wording.

decisions.point: How to expose public sources in the CLI
decisions.chose: Made public source resolution derive from registered public adapters and updated help/error text to advertise codex|claude-code consistently.
decisions.rationale: This keeps the fixed command surface intact while making public-source gating match adapter registration instead of a codex-only special case.

decisions.point: What user-facing artifacts to update with the new source boundary
decisions.chose: Updated current-state README, architecture/roadmap docs, distributable skill source, and skill references to describe claude-code as public but experimental.
decisions.rationale: Without these updates, checkout behavior, release guidance, and installed-skill guidance would drift and overstate the old private boundary.

rejected.alternative: Skip release packaging work and stop at green tests.
rejected.reason: The user's goal is publish state, so the version bump and dry-run packaging proof were part of the required closeout.

review_notes: Validated with focused tests for src/sources/claude-code.test.ts, src/sources/codex.test.ts, and src/cli.test.ts.
Validated with full npm run check: 28 test files and 180 tests passed.
Validated checkout-level claude-code smoke on sync/find/read-page/stats using a synthetic temp transcript root.
Validated packaging with npm publish --dry-run; actual npm publication is expected to happen through the existing GitHub release workflow on tag push because local npm auth is not configured.

architectural_claims: Session source visibility is now controlled by adapter.public rather than a codex-only CLI special case.
Claude Code joins the fixed source-aware command surface without changing omitted-source default behavior, which remains codex.
Public Claude support is intentionally documented as an experimental transcript-reader contract rather than a stable raw transcript schema promise.
behavioral_changes: status/sync/find/read-range/read-page/list/stats now accept --source claude-code in public CLI builds.
CLI help and unsupported_source errors now advertise the full public source set codex|claude-code.
Current-state docs and distributable skill guidance now direct users through experimental public Claude Code support instead of a private adapter boundary.
security_implications: Claude Code public support still indexes only allowlisted transcript text semantics; the seal does not widen parser acceptance to arbitrary record types.
migration_notes: Bumped package version from 0.3.5 to 0.3.6 for release packaging.
Actual npm publication is expected via the repository's GitHub Actions release workflow on tag push.
